# Boulevard Café Elbasan

> Premium café in Elbasan, Albania offering coffee, food, and table-side digital service (call waiter, request bill, QR menu ordering).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Welcome page — call waiter, request bill, order from menu, request songs, and rate the café.
- [Menu](/menu): Full digital menu with categories, prices in Lekë, and QR-based table ordering.
- [Install](/install): Instructions to install the Boulevard Café web app on your device.
